raw_text: lucía vila nuño about me aerospace engineering student with great interest in the innovation and technological development of the sector, especially in defense. great adaptability. would be interested in expanding my knowledge in the area of control and intelligent systems. accustomed to living in international environments and working in teams. like languages and interpersonal relationships. work experience spring semester 2025 research grant ia bio lab digital futures university of cincinnati activities: research on incorporation of al for enhanced safety in advanced air mobility - concepts: advanced air mobility, true al, fuzzy-logic - writing a conference paper for nafips 2025 june 2024 - august 2024 camo engineer (professional internships ii) indaer europe, s.l. activities: airworthiness management and other aeronautical engineering activities in commercial civil aviation: - support in camo certification process and requirements - technical documentation evaluation process july 2023 - august 2023 project engineer (professional internships ) design, business & verifications services (dbvservices) activities: use of several programs (autocad, ptc creo, simsolid, erps), for multiple jobs, including: - 3d cad modelling and component design - structural and mechanical calculations (fea y cfd) - manufacturing costs and orders - drafting reports and declarations of conformity in accordance with current regulations and legislation metrology, calculation with measuring arm university projects aircraft design (capstone): the project consisted of designing an aircraft applying all knowledge gained in the classroom in a real work environment following the requirements stated by the sae. the ultimate goal is to compete in sae aero design west (april 2025). was part of the following teams: - stability and control: select the servos and design the connections in the control surfaces and steering wheel. structures: do fea analysis on the landing gears and designing the dimensions. system integration: connect all system integrating the work of all the groups. contact siero (asturias) leganés (madrid) +34 634 567 693 @ 0 luciavn@ gmail.com linkedin.com/in/lucia-vilar-nufio education bachelors in aerospace engineering (2024-2025) university of cincinnati bachelors in aerospace engineering (2020-2025) mention in aerospace vehicles university carlos iii of madrid. full degree in english science and technology high school (2018-2020) colegio dulce nombre de jesus, oviedo (2nd year) victoria high school, ks, eeuu (1st year) certifications and courses leadership (2023) ielts c1 (september 2023) cambridge in avanced english (cae)- c1 (august 2020) goethe zertifikat b1 (august 2016) sensorsat campus university of oviedo (july 2019) standardkurs deutsch als fremdsprache (july 2016- 2018) (aschaffenburg- potsdam- k6ln) skills driving license b programs: e excel e ptccreo e overleaf (latex) e autocad e matlab e simsolid e abaqus e simulink e ansys (fluent) e proosis e solid edge e xflr5 nn languages e spanish (c2) e english (c1) e german (b1) e french (b1) e russian (a2)
